changes.title: 新增
items: 新增 `unity_yaml_list` 和 `unity_yaml_search`，用于在读取对象详情前检查 Unity 场景与 Prefab 层级。
`unity_yaml_read` 新增更细的详情模式，支持实时 Editor 读取、Prefab override、序列化字段和重复名称安全路径。
Chat 会话渲染新增隐藏已完成 thinking 的显示设置，并按真实顺序展示 thinking、工具调用和流式文本。
Markdown 与 Chat 资产引用支持更多 Unity、工作区和 `ProjectSettings` 路径格式。

changes.title: 修复
items: 修复自定义模型端点的推理参数配置，OpenAI Chat、OpenAI Responses、Anthropic 兼容端点现在可以发送正确的推理参数格式，并显示可用推理强度。
启动和切换工作区时会校准已加载的资产数据库，处理过期引用图、同路径 GUID 冲突、大小/哈希变化和脚本级联更新。
Unity 域重载期间保留嵌入式 WebView，并对临时关闭执行延迟清理。
Knowledge lexical rebuild 进度改为接收状态事件推送。
Settings 会缓存调试模式状态，重新挂载设置面板时保持开关状态稳定。
Chat 文件变更撤销执行中会锁定撤销按钮，避免重复触发。
改进 Subagent 和 Unity recompile 工具调用的等待状态展示。

changes.title: Added
items: Added `unity_yaml_list` and `unity_yaml_search` for inspecting Unity scene and prefab hierarchies before reading object detail.
Added richer `unity_yaml_read` detail modes for live Editor reads, prefab overrides, serialized fields, and duplicate-safe object paths.
Added chat transcript controls for hiding completed thinking blocks and preserving the actual order of thinking, tool calls, and streamed text.
Added broader Markdown and chat asset reference handling for Unity, workspace, and `ProjectSettings` paths.

changes.title: Fixed
items: Fixed custom endpoint reasoning configuration so OpenAI Chat, OpenAI Responses, and Anthropic-compatible endpoints can send the correct reasoning parameter format and expose supported effort levels.
Reconciled loaded asset databases on startup and workspace switch so stale reference graph rows, same-path GUID conflicts, size/hash changes, and script cascades are detected.
Kept the Unity embedded WebView alive during Unity domain reloads, with delayed cleanup for transient reload closes.
Updated Knowledge lexical rebuild progress to use pushed status events instead of polling.
Cached debug mode state in Settings so remounted settings panels keep the correct toggle state.
Locked chat file-change undo while an undo operation is already running.
Improved subagent and Unity recompile tool-call waiting states.
